novel_features.name: Lyric-line grep
novel_features.description: Find clips by remembered lyric, prompt, or tag phrases via local full-text search.
novel_features.rationale: Suno's server-side search is title-text only; this runs FTS5 over the title/tags of your locally synced library.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Reach for this when an agent needs to locate a specific past song by its content, not its title.
novel_features.group: Local library no Suno tool has

novel_features.name: Library analytics
novel_features.description: Grouped roll-ups across your whole library: counts, average duration/bpm, total plays and upvotes by any clip field.
novel_features.rationale: No single Suno API call returns cross-clip aggregates; this is a pure local SQL roll-up over the synced store.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Use this to see which models or settings produced your most-played tracks before the next session.
novel_features.group: Local library no Suno tool has

novel_features.name: Variation lineage
novel_features.description: Render the iteration tree of a track: its extends, covers, and remixes, reconstructed from local links.
novel_features.rationale: Suno never exposes iteration as a tree; this walks is_remix and extend/cover parent references in local SQLite.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Reach for this to trace which seed a finished song descended from across many variations.
novel_features.group: Local library no Suno tool has

novel_features.name: Top tracks
novel_features.description: Ranked flat list of your best clips by plays, upvotes, or duration, with machine-readable output.
novel_features.rationale: No competitor persists a local library to rank; this orders the synced clips table and emits clean JSON.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Use this to pipe your strongest tracks into a publishing or playlist workflow.
novel_features.group: Local library no Suno tool has

novel_features.name: Raw SQL
novel_features.description: Run read-only SQL directly against your local synced clip store.
novel_features.rationale: Every existing Suno client is stateless; this is the escape hatch over a real persisted library.
novel_features.example: suno-pp-cli sql "SELECT title, duration FROM clips WHERE make_instrumental = 1 ORDER BY duration DESC LIMIT 5" --json
novel_features.why_it_matters: Reach for this when an agent needs an arbitrary query no fixed command covers.
novel_features.group: Local library no Suno tool has

novel_features.name: Credit throttle report
novel_features.description: Remaining credits plus your recent generation volume measured against Suno's captcha-throttle threshold.
novel_features.rationale: Joins the live billing snapshot with a trailing-window count of local clip timestamps against the documented ~200-credit threshold.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Use this before a batch session to judge how many more generations you can run before hCaptcha kicks in.

narrative.headline: The correct, offline-first Suno CLI: every feature the abandoned clients have, plus a local SQLite library, full-text search, and agent-native output none of them ship.
narrative.value_prop: Suno has no official API and every reverse-engineered client is abandoned and wrong in ways that matter today: broken pagination, broken cover, stale pre-2026 auth, no local persistence. This CLI is built from the current contract. It walks the real opaque feed cursor, sends the now-required cover title, tolerates the drifted billing schema, authenticates against the current auth.suno.com Clerk flow via your logged-in browser, and persists your whole library to local SQLite for offline grep, SQL, lineage, and analytics. Generate, extend, cover, remaster, stems, lyrics, WAV download, and workspaces, all with --json, --select, --dry-run, and typed exit codes.
narrative.auth_narrative: Suno uses Clerk session auth (auth.suno.com). Run `suno-pp-cli auth login --chrome` to capture your logged-in session cookie from Chrome; the CLI mints and refreshes the short-lived JWT for you. No password or API key is stored. Music generation is attempted optimistically with no token. Suno gates generation adaptively (an hCaptcha anti-bot challenge that usually fires only after sustained use), so many generations succeed outright; if Suno challenges a request, the CLI tells you to retry with `--token` carrying an hCaptcha token (e.g. solved via 2Captcha). All read, library, and metadata commands never need a captcha.

quickstart.comment: Confirm the binary and config resolve before anything touches the network.
After 'auth login --chrome', pull your whole library into local SQLite (walks the opaque feed cursor).
Find clips by a remembered lyric phrase via local full-text search.
Rank your best tracks for a publishing workflow.

troubleshoots.symptom: auth login fails or commands return 401 or Token validation failed
troubleshoots.fix: Re-run `suno-pp-cli auth login --chrome` while logged in to suno.com in Chrome; JWTs are short-lived and refreshed from the captured Clerk cookie.
Supply an hCaptcha token with `--token <token>` (e.g. from 2Captcha) or pass `--no-captcha` if your environment provides one; read/library commands never need it.

troubleshoots.symptom: list or sync only returns the first page
troubleshoots.fix: This CLI walks the opaque next_cursor automatically; pass `--all` to drain the entire library, or `--full` on sync.
This CLI sends the now-required title field automatically; pass `--title` if you want a specific cover title.

narrative.when_to_use: Use this CLI when an agent or script needs to generate Suno music programmatically, manage and search a personal Suno library offline, organize tracks into workspaces, or run reproducible generate/poll/download pipelines with typed exit codes and JSON output. It is the right choice over the abandoned community wrappers because it tracks the current Suno contract and persists everything locally.

recipes.title: Generate a custom song and wait for it
recipes.command: suno-pp-cli generate --title "Night Drive" --tags "synthwave, retro" --lyrics "Neon lights on wet asphalt" --token hc_demo_token --wait --json
recipes.explanation: Submits a custom generation, polls until complete, and prints the finished clip as JSON. Replace the token with a real hCaptcha token.

recipes.title: Pull a deeply nested clip and select only what you need
recipes.explanation: Fetches a clip and narrows the verbose nested payload to just the fields an agent needs, saving context.

recipes.title: Find and rank instrumentals offline
recipes.command: suno-pp-cli sql "SELECT title, duration FROM clips WHERE make_instrumental = 1 ORDER BY duration DESC LIMIT 5" --json
recipes.explanation: Queries the local store directly for your longest instrumental tracks, no API call.

recipes.title: Check throttle headroom before a session
recipes.explanation: Shows remaining credits and recent generation volume against the captcha-throttle threshold.

recipes.title: Organize tracks into a workspace
recipes.command: suno-pp-cli workspace add ws_3f2a91 --clip clip_a1b2 --clip clip_c3d4
recipes.explanation: Adds clips to a Suno workspace (project) so they stay organized on suno.com.

recipes.title: Download a lossless WAV
recipes.explanation: Triggers WAV conversion, polls until ready, and saves the lossless file (Pro/Premier).

trigger_phrases: organize my suno tracks into a workspace
what are my top suno songs
